```{=html}
<!-- Configure the data + condition here. PASS marks rows meeting the condition. -->
<script>
window.FR_TITLE = 'filter(bill_length_mm > 45)';
window.FR_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    '41.80'],
  ['Adelie',    '36.50'],
  ['Adelie',    '40.30'],
  ['Chinstrap', '45.40'],
  ['Chinstrap', '46.50'],
  ['Chinstrap', '46'],
  ['Gentoo',    '43.60'],
  ['Gentoo',    '45.10'],
  ['Gentoo',    '50.70'],
];
window.FR_PASS = [false, false, false, true, true, true, false, true, true];
window.FR_COLS = ['species', 'bill_length_mm'];
</script>
```

::: {.fr-stage-wrap}
<div id="fr-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .fr-frag id="fr-highlight"}
[]{.fragment .fr-frag id="fr-arrows"}
